SAKURAMOD-TEMPORARY.title: Forgotten
SAKURAMOD-TEMPORARY.description: Cards with Forgotten enter Memory at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARDPILE_MEMORY.title: Memory
SAKURA_MOD_CARDPILE_MEMORY.description: During this combat, cards with Forgotten enter this pile at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARDPILE_MEMORY.empty: There are no cards in Memory.
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION.title: Reflection
SAKURAMOD-REFLECTION.description:
Each Reflection stack causes the attacker to take half of this attack's damage.
After you are attacked, remove 1 Reflection stack.
At the end of the enemy turn, remove 1 Reflection stack.
SAKURAMOD-ENTER_LABYRINTH.title: Enter the Labyrinth
SAKURAMOD-ENTER_LABYRINTH.description: Enemies in the Labyrinth cannot act and are unaffected by Attack cards. Starting at the end of your next turn, whenever your turn ends, a random enemy in the Labyrinth leaves it.
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.title: Remind
SAKURAMOD-REMIND.description:
Choose N cards from [gold]Memory[/gold]; if fewer than N are available, choose all of them.
Consume them and add copies to your hand. They gain [red]Forgotten[/red] and cost 0 this turn. Cards recalled by Remind do not enter [gold]Memory[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_CARD.title: Spell
SAKURAMOD-SPELL_CARD.description: A special card type that is not a Clow Card, usually consumed after use.
SAKURAMOD-UNREAL.title: Unreal
SAKURAMOD-UNREAL.description: When this card exhausts another card, add a copy of this card into your discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_CARD.title: Earthy
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_CARD.description: An Earthy card. When played while Magic Charge is active, this card enters Earthy state. While in Earthy state, playing Earthy cards grants Block.
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_SPELL_CARD.title: Earthy
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_SPELL_CARD.description: An Earthy spell. Counts as an Earthy card.
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_STATE.title: Earthy state
SAKURAMOD-EARTHY_STATE.description: Whenever you play an Earthy card, gain 4 Block.
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_CARD.title: Firey
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_CARD.description: A Firey card. When played while Magic Charge is active, this card enters Firey state. While in Firey state, playing Firey cards can deal damage.
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_SPELL_CARD.title: Firey
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_SPELL_CARD.description: A Firey spell. Counts as a Firey card.
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_STATE.title: Firey state
SAKURAMOD-FIREY_STATE.description: Whenever you play a Firey card, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_CARD.title: Watery
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_CARD.description: A Watery card. When played while Magic Charge is active, this card enters Watery state. While in Watery state, playing Watery cards can grant Energy.
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_SPELL_CARD.title: Watery
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_SPELL_CARD.description: A Watery spell. Counts as a Watery card.
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_STATE.title: Watery state
SAKURAMOD-WATERY_STATE.description: Whenever you play 2 Watery cards, gain 1 Energy.
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_CARD.title: Windy
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_CARD.description: A Windy card. When played while Magic Charge is active, this card enters Windy state. While in Windy state, playing Windy cards can draw cards.
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_SPELL_CARD.title: Windy
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_SPELL_CARD.description: A Windy spell. Counts as a Windy card.
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_STATE.title: Windy state
SAKURAMOD-WINDY_STATE.description: Whenever you play 2 Windy cards, draw 1 card.
